codeReview.summary: The accordion animation feature was already fully implemented and correctly configured. The worker properly verified the existing implementation meets all requirements. The animation timing (240ms ease-out expand, 200ms ease-in collapse) and chevron rotation (180° over 200ms) are correctly implemented in the codebase.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker correctly identified that this feature required verification of existing implementation rather than new code changes. The skill and AGENTS.md documentation adequately covered the animation verification procedure.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Worker transcript shows grep for animation classes, read of accordion.tsx and index.css, followed by agent-browser visual verification

summary: PASS: The accordion animation implementation is correct and complete. The expand animation uses 240ms ease-out, collapse uses 200ms ease-in, and the chevron rotates 180° over 200ms - all matching the feature requirements. The worker properly verified the implementation via visual testing at mobile viewport (390x844) and confirmed smooth animations with no console errors. Note: The commitId (e7936ee) in the handoff is from a previous unrelated feature (hover states on toggle-group), as this verification required no new code changes. VAL-MICRO-010 is fulfilled.
